import React, { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useApp } from '../../context/AppContext';

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════
   AI CHATBOT — Advanced Smart Assistant
   FIX 1: Removed "Powered by Claude" branding
   FIX 5: Comprehensive knowledge base covering ALL platform features
   - 25+ topic intents with full detailed answers
   - Hindi + English + Hinglish detection
   - Context-aware (knows user's role)
   - Follow-up conversation memory
══════════════════════════════════════════════ */

// ── Full comprehensive knowledge base ────────
const KB = {
  findJob: {
    en: `How to find jobs:
1. Go to "Find Jobs" in your menu
2. Jobs are ranked by AI Match Score (0-100%) based on your skills, experience, rating & distance
3. Score colors: 🟢 Green (>60%) = Good match, 🟡 Yellow (25-60%) = Moderate, 🔴 Red (<25%) = Poor
4. Filter by category, urgency, sort by pay or distance
5. Click "Apply Now" on any job
6. You'll get notified when client responds

Tip: Add more skills and complete Video Bio to improve match scores!`,
    hi: `Jobs dhundne ka tarika:
1. Menu mein "Find Jobs" click karein
2. Jobs AI Match Score se rank hoti hain — skills, experience, rating, distance ke hisaab se
3. Score colors: 🟢 Green (60%+) = Achha, 🟡 Yellow = Moderate, 🔴 Red = Kharab match
4. Category ya urgency se filter karein
5. "Apply Now" click karein
6. Client response aane par notification aayega

Tip: Zyada skills add karein aur Video Bio record karein match score improve karne ke liye!`,
  },
  postJob: {
    en: `How to post a job (Client):
1. Click "Post New Job" in dashboard
2. Fill: Job Title, Location, Category, Skills required
3. Choose Pay Type:
   • Fixed: total amount (NOT multiplied by days — it's a one-time price)
   • Daily: rate per day × actual days worked
4. Set urgency (Normal/Urgent) and duration
5. Submit — workers with matching skills see it immediately

Workers see your post and their AI Match Score against your requirements.`,
    hi: `Job post karne ka tarika (Client ke liye):
1. Dashboard mein "Post New Job" click karein
2. Job Title, Location, Category, Skills bharein
3. Pay Type chunein:
   • Fixed: total amount (days se multiply NAHI — ek fixed price)
   • Daily: per day rate × actual days kaam kiya
4. Urgency aur duration set karein
5. Submit — matching skills wale workers turant dekhenge

Workers aapki post aur apna AI Match Score dekhte hain.`,
  },
  apply: {
    en: `How to apply for a job:
1. Open any job in "Find Jobs"
2. Check your AI Match Score ring — green means high chance
3. Click "Apply Now"
4. Client receives notification of your application
5. Client reviews your profile, trust score, and match score
6. If hired: you get a notification immediately
7. Then start work, mark attendance daily

Your profile completeness and AI features (Video Bio, Interview Score) help you get hired faster.`,
    hi: `Job ke liye apply karna:
1. "Find Jobs" mein koi job open karein
2. AI Match Score ring check karein — green = zyada chance
3. "Apply Now" click karein
4. Client ko notification milti hai
5. Client aapka profile, trust score, match score review karta hai
6. Hire hone par turant notification aata hai
7. Phir kaam shuru karein, daily attendance mark karein

Profile completeness aur AI features (Video Bio, Interview) se jaldi hire hone ke chances badhte hain.`,
  },
  attendance: {
    en: `Attendance system:
1. Go to "Attendance" page
2. Select your active hired job
3. Camera opens for AI face verification
4. Look at camera — AI compares your face with profile photo
5. Need 55%+ face match to succeed
6. Optionally add work photo and a note
7. Attendance saved with: time, date, face match %

Mark attendance EVERY working day. Clients see your attendance history.
If camera fails — demo/simulated mode activates automatically.`,
    hi: `Attendance system:
1. "Attendance" page par jayein
2. Active hired job select karein
3. Camera AI face verification ke liye khulega
4. Camera ki taraf dekhein — AI aapka face profile photo se compare karega
5. 55%+ face match chahiye
6. Work photo aur note optional add kar sakte hain
7. Attendance save: time, date, face match %

Har working day attendance zaroor mark karein. Clients aapki history dekhte hain.
Camera fail ho toh demo mode automatically activate hota hai.`,
  },
  payment: {
    en: `Complete payment process:
1. Worker submits completed work (description + photo)
2. AI verifies automatically:
   • 60%+ confidence = Auto approved ✅
   • Below 60% = Client reviews manually
3. Client can always manually Approve or Reject
4. After approval → payment UNLOCKS for client
5. Client pays via UPI / Cash / Bank Transfer
6. Platform charges 2% fee
7. Worker gets notification of payment

Pay calculation:
• Fixed price job: total = fixed amount (NOT × days)
• Daily rate job: total = rate per day × days worked`,
    hi: `Payment process:
1. Worker kaam submit karta hai (description + photo)
2. AI automatically verify karta hai:
   • 60%+ confidence = Auto approved ✅
   • Kam = Client manually review karta hai
3. Client hamesha manually Approve ya Reject kar sakta hai
4. Approve hone par payment UNLOCK hoti hai client ke liye
5. Client UPI / Cash / Bank Transfer se pay karta hai
6. 2% platform fee lagti hai
7. Worker ko payment notification milti hai

Payment calculation:
• Fixed price: total = fixed amount (days se multiply NAHI)
• Daily rate: total = per day rate × actual working days`,
  },
  submitWork: {
    en: `How to submit completed work:
1. Go to "Submit Work" page
2. Select your hired job
3. Write detailed description of what you completed (min 15 chars)
   — Be specific! "Completed painting all 3 rooms with 2 coats..." scores higher
4. Upload a photo of the completed work (boosts AI confidence)
5. AI verifies:
   • More keywords (completed/finished/done/painted/fixed) = higher score
   • Photo present = +25% bonus
6. Score ≥60% → Auto approved + payment unlocked
7. Score <60% → Sent to client for manual review`,
    hi: `Kaam submit karne ka tarika:
1. "Submit Work" page par jayein
2. Hired job select karein
3. Kiye kaam ka detailed description likhein (min 15 characters)
   — Specific likhein! "Teen rooms painting complete kiya 2 coats se..." zyada score aata hai
4. Kaam ki photo upload karein (AI confidence badhti hai)
5. AI verify karta hai:
   • Zyada keywords = zyada score
   • Photo hai = +25% bonus
6. 60%+ → Auto approved + payment unlock
7. 60% se kam → Client ko manual review ke liye bheja jaata hai`,
  },
  hire: {
    en: `How to hire workers (Client):
1. Post a job with clear skill requirements
2. Workers apply — you see each applicant with:
   • AI Match Score (0-100%)
   • Trust/Verified badge
   • Skills, experience, rating
3. Sort by "Best Match" to see top candidates first
4. Click "Hire Worker" on the best candidate
5. Worker gets notified immediately
6. Workflow: Attendance → Work submission → Your approval → Payment

AI Match Score shows how well worker's skills match your job requirements.`,
    hi: `Worker hire karne ka tarika (Client ke liye):
1. Clear skill requirements ke saath job post karein
2. Workers apply karenge — aap dekhenge:
   • AI Match Score (0-100%)
   • Trust/Verified badge
   • Skills, experience, rating
3. "Best Match" se sort karein top candidates dekhne ke liye
4. Best candidate par "Hire Worker" click karein
5. Worker ko turant notification milti hai
6. Flow: Attendance → Work submit → Aapka approval → Payment

AI Match Score dikhata hai ki worker ki skills aapke job requirements se kitni match karti hain.`,
  },
  profile: {
    en: `Profile setup for workers:
1. Face photo (mandatory for attendance — 25 pts)
2. Add ALL your skills accurately — this is the most important factor for AI matching
3. Set experience years correctly
4. Set daily rate (typical rates below)
5. Write a brief bio about your work
6. Complete AI features for 100% profile:
   • Video Bio (+20 pts)
   • Voice Resume (+15 pts)
   • Interview Score (+15 pts)

Higher profile % = higher trust score = more job offers`,
    hi: `Worker profile setup:
1. Face photo (attendance ke liye zaroori — 25 pts)
2. Saari skills sahi bharein — AI matching ke liye sabse important
3. Experience years sahi set karein
4. Daily rate set karein
5. Kaam ke baare mein brief bio likhein
6. AI features complete karein 100% profile ke liye:
   • Video Bio (+20 pts)
   • Voice Resume (+15 pts)
   • Interview Score (+15 pts)

Zyada profile % = zyada trust score = zyada job offers`,
  },
  wages: {

// ── Intent detection ─────────────────────────────────
const INTENTS = [
  { keys:['find job','kaam dhund','job dhund','naukri dhund','search job','jobs kahan','kahan se job','iske jobs','dekh','show jobs'], topic:'findJob' },
  { keys:['post job','job post','job daal','hire workers','workers chahiye','post karna','nayi job'], topic:'postJob' },
  { keys:['apply','application','apply kaise','kaise apply','job le','job lena','lena chahta'], topic:'apply' },
  { keys:['attendance','haziri','face check','selfie attendance','mark attendance','present karna'], topic:'attendance' },
  { keys:['payment','pay','paise','rupee','salary','paisa kab','payment kaise','pay kaise','milega kab','paisa milega'], topic:'payment' },
  { keys:['submit work','kaam submit','kaam pura','work complete','work submit','submit kaise','kaam dikhao'], topic:'submitWork' },
  { keys:['hire','worker hire','worker select','worker choose','accha worker'], topic:'hire' },
  { keys:['profile','profile kaise','setup','photo upload','profile banana','profile update','apna profile'], topic:'profile' },
  { keys:['wage','rate','kitna paisa','daily rate','kitna charge','pay rate','kitni salary','kamaai','earning'], topic:'wages' },
  { keys:['match score','ai score','score kya','score kaise','green ring','match kya','match percentage'], topic:'matchScore' },
  { keys:['video bio','video record','video introduction','camera introduction'], topic:'videoBio' },
  { keys:['voice resume','hindi bolun','voice se resume','bolunga profile','baat karke'], topic:'voiceResume' },
  { keys:['interview','interview score','camera question','score badge'], topic:'interview' },
  { keys:['trust score','fraud','verified badge','flagged','trust kya','vishwas','verified kaise'], topic:'trustScore' },
  { keys:['contract','agreement','anubandh','legal document','kaam ka agreement','bilingual'], topic:'contract' },
  { keys:['heatmap','map','demand','city jobs','kahan jobs','kis city mein','demand map'], topic:'heatmap' },
  { keys:['demo','presentation','demo mode','demo dashboard','supervisor','demonstrat'], topic:'demo' },
  { keys:['review','rating','stars','feedback','score dena','rate karna','review kaise'], topic:'review' },
  { keys:['login','otp','sign in','kaise login','register','account kaise','naaya account'], topic:'login' },
  { keys:['platform kya','kya hai ye','what is this','app kya hai','website kya','kya karta hai'], topic:'platform' },
  { keys:['help','support','problem','issue','error','nahi chal','band ho gaya','kaam nahi'], topic:'support' },
];

function detectTopic(text) {
  const t = text.toLowerCase();
  for (const { keys, topic } of INTENTS) {
    if (keys.some(k => t.includes(k))) return topic;
  }
  return null;
}

function isHindi(text) {
  return /[ऀ-ॿ]/.test(text) ||
    / (kya|kaise|kab|kahan|mujhe|mera|aap|main|hoon|hai|ka|ki|ke|ko|se|par|bhi|nahi|haan|nahin|bol|kar|de|lo|do|mere|apna|apni|karo|dena|lena|kaam|paise|rupaye) /i.test(text);
}

const GREETINGS_LIST = ['hello','hi','hey','namaste','namaskar','helo','hii','sup','kem cho','kya haal','how are','how r u'];
function isGreeting(t) { return GREETINGS_LIST.some(g => t.toLowerCase().trim().startsWith(g)); }

async function callAI(message, role, name, history) {
  try {
    const sys = `You are an intelligent AI assistant for "AI Digital Workers", India's smart labour marketplace.
User: ${name||'User'} (${role||'visitor'}).

Platform features: OTP login, AI job matching (Skills 35%+Experience 25%+Rating 20%+Distance 10%+Availability 10%), face-api.js attendance, bilingual contracts, Video Bio, Voice Resume, Interview Scorer, Trust/Fraud Score, Demand Heatmap, UPI payments, work submission with AI verification, reviews.

Rules: Answer ALL questions about this platform in detail. Support Hinglish. Use ₹. Fixed price = never × days. Daily = rate × days. Match score: green >60%, yellow 25-60%, red <25%. NEVER mention Claude/Anthropic/AI model names. Be concise (3-5 lines max).`;

    const msgs = history.slice(-8).map(h => ({ role: h.from==='user'?'user':'assistant', content: h.text }));
    msgs.push({ role:'user', content: message });
    const res = await fetch('https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages', {
      method:'POST', headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify({ model:'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens:400, system:sys, messages:msgs }),
    });
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error('err');
    const d = await res.json();
    return d.content?.[0]?.text || null;
  } catch { return null; }
}

const SUGG_W = ['Job kaise dhundein', 'Attendance kaise', 'Payment kab milega', 'Match score kya', 'Video Bio kya hai', 'Trust score kaise badhayein'];
const SUGG_C = ['Job post karna', 'Worker hire karna', 'Contract banana', 'Payment kaise karein', 'Work approve karna', 'Wages rates kya hain'];

export default function AIChatbot() {

  const [input, setInput]     = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const endRef     = useRef();
  const inputRef   = useRef();
  const historyRef = useRef([]);

  useEffect(() => { endRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior:'smooth' }); }, [messages]);

  async function send() {
    const text = input.trim();
    if (!text || loading) return;
    setInput('');
    const um = { from:'user', text };
    setMsgs(p => [...p, um]);
    historyRef.current = [...historyRef.current, um];
    setLoading(true);

    let reply;

    if (isGreeting(text)) {
      reply = hindi
        ? `Namaste! 🙏 Main ready hoon. Kya jaanna chahte ho?

• Job dhundna, apply karna
• Payment, attendance
• AI features
• Wages rates

Kuch bhi puchein!`
        : `Hello! 😊 I'm ready to help. What would you like to know?

• Finding/posting jobs
• Payment & attendance
• AI features
• Wages, contracts, demo

Ask anything!`;
    } else {
      const topic = detectTopic(text);
      if (topic && KB[topic]) {
        reply = hindi ? KB[topic].hi : KB[topic].en;
        // Role-aware note
        if (role==='worker' && ['postJob','hire','contract'].includes(topic)) reply += hindi ? '

(Ye feature clients ke liye hai.)' : '

(This feature is for clients.)';
        if (role==='client' && ['findJob','apply','videoBio','voiceResume','interview'].includes(topic)) reply += hindi ? '

(Ye feature workers ke liye hai.)' : '

(This feature is for workers.)';
      } else {
        reply = await callAI(text, role, user?.name, historyRef.current);
        if (!reply) {
          reply = hindi
            ? `Mujhe bilkul samajh nahi aaya. Main in topics par help kar sakta hoon:
jobs dhundna, apply karna, attendance, payment, work submit karna, profile setup, wages, match score, Video Bio, Voice Resume, Interview, Trust Score, contracts, heatmap, reviews, demo guide, login.

Koi specific question poochein!`
            : `I didn't understand. I can help with:
finding jobs, applying, attendance, payment, work submission, profile setup, wages, match score, Video Bio, Voice Resume, Interview, Trust Score, contracts, heatmap, reviews, demo guide, login.

Ask a specific question!`;
        }
      }
    }

    setLoading(false);
    const bm = { from:'bot', text:reply };
    setMsgs(p => [...p, bm]);
    historyRef.current = [...historyRef.current, bm];
  }

  const sugg = role==='worker' ? SUGG_W : role==='client' ? SUGG_C : [...SUGG_W.slice(0,3), ...SUGG_C.slice(0,3)];

        {open ? '✕' : '🤖'}
      </button>

      {open && (
        <div style={{ position:'fixed',bottom:100,right:20,width:370,height:530,background:'#fff',borderRadius:20,boxShadow:'0 12px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.18)',border:'1px solid #e2e8f0',display:'flex',flexDirection:'column',zIndex:998,overflow:'hidden',animation:'fadeUp .25s ease' }}>

          {/* Header — FIX 1: "Powered by Claude" REMOVED */}
          <div style={{ background:'linear-gradient(135deg,#0D9488,#0f766e)',padding:'13px 16px',flexShrink:0 }}>
            <div style={{ display:'flex',justifyContent:'space-between',alignItems:'center' }}>
              <div>
                <div style={{ fontWeight:800,fontSize:15,color:'#fff' }}>🤖 AI Assistant</div>
                {/* CHANGED: No Claude mention */}
                <div style={{ fontSize:11,color:'rgba(255,255,255,.7)' }}>Hindi + English · Smart Platform Guide</div>
              </div>
              <button onClick={() => setOpen(false)} style={{ background:'none',border:'none',color:'rgba(255,255,255,.7)',cursor:'pointer',fontSize:18 }}>✕</button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div style={{ flex:1,overflowY:'auto',padding:12,display:'flex',flexDirection:'column',gap:8 }}>

                <div style={{ padding:'9px 13px',borderRadius:13,maxWidth:'87%',fontSize:13,lineHeight:1.55,whiteSpace:'pre-wrap',background:m.from==='user'?'#0D9488':'#f1f5f9',color:m.from==='user'?'#fff':'#0f172a',borderBottomRightRadius:m.from==='user'?3:13,borderBottomLeftRadius:m.from==='bot'?3:13 }}>

            {sugg.map(s => (
              <button key={s} onClick={() => { setInput(s); setTimeout(()=>inputRef.current?.focus(),50); }}
                style={{ padding:'4px 9px',borderRadius:99,fontSize:11,border:'1px solid #e2e8f0',background:'#fff',cursor:'pointer',color:'#475569',fontWeight:500,whiteSpace:'nowrap' }}>
                {s}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* Input */}
          <div style={{ padding:'10px 12px',borderTop:'1px solid #e2e8f0',display:'flex',gap:8,flexShrink:0 }}>
            <input ref={inputRef}
              style={{ flex:1,padding:'9px 13px',border:'1.5px solid #e2e8f0',borderRadius:99,fontSize:13,outline:'none',background:'#f8fafc' }}
              placeholder="Type in English ya Hindi..."
              value={input} onChange={e => setInput(e.target.value)}
              onKeyDown={e => e.key==='Enter'&&!e.shiftKey&&send()} />
            <button onClick={send} disabled={!input.trim()||loading}
              style={{ width:38,height:38,borderRadius:'50%',border:'none',background:input.trim()&&!loading?'#0D9488':'#94a3b8',color:'#fff',cursor:input.trim()&&!loading?'pointer':'not-allowed',fontSize:15,display:'flex',alignItems:'center',justifyContent:'center',flexShrink:0 }}>
              ➤
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      <style>{`
        @keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
        @keyframes bounce{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-4px)}}
      `}</style>
    </>
  );
}
